title: xanthophyllum rectum
intro: Xanthophyllum rectum, also known as the straight-angled Xanthophyllum, is a species of plant in the family Polygalaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections due to its antipyretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum rectum include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and providing relief from fever, making it a valuable treatment for various respiratory conditions. Xanthophyllum rectum can be prepared as a decoction, where the roots and leaves are boiled in water to create a herbal remedy, or as a tincture, which is a concentrated liquid extract of the plant.
